results.rendered_html:
ajarya (3. a + jarya)
1〉 adj. nicht alternd, nicht vergehend  ŚAT. BR. 3,4,2,4 .
— 2〉 n. Freundschaft  P. 3,1,105 .  VOP. 26,16 .  TRIK. 3,2,1 .  H. 731 .  RAGH. 18,16 .

results.rendered_html:
ajarya a. [na jīryati; jṝ kartari yat  P. III. 1. 105 ]
1 Not digestible.
2 Not decaying, imperishable, everlasting, perpetual.
— ryaṃ (with saṃgataṃ expressed or understood) Friendship; mṛgairajaryaṃ jarasopadiṣṭaṃ  R. 18. 7.
